component.name: Hyprland Settings
component.summary: Review and safely edit supported Hyprland settings

description.p: Hyprland Settings is a GTK/libadwaita application for browsing official Hyprland setting metadata, reviewing the active config layout, using guarded reversible runtime previews, and applying drift-safe atomic saves for supported settings.

The current implementation exposes 290 of 341 scalar rows, supports fresh-absence insertion for eligible missing settings, and persists proven existing Animation and Bezier Curve records. It keeps 51 high-risk scalar rows, duplicate auto-resolution, five other structured families, and profile/mode activation blocked.
The bundled metadata targets Hyprland 0.55.2. This app is not an official Hyprland project.

Runtime-first live preview with supervised dead-man recovery, Safe Live Save Mode gating every save, gated single-write persistence with byte-exact backups and reread verification, a structured-family record picker for proven animation and bezier record shapes (enabled, speed, and existing-curve references), and a Hyprland 0.55.4 zero-drift compatibility audit.

Release candidate: runtime-first live preview with supervised dead-man recovery, Safe Live Save Mode gating every save, gated single-write persistence with byte-exact backups and reread verification, a structured-family record picker for proven animation and bezier record shapes, and a Hyprland 0.55.4 zero-drift compatibility audit.
First release: read-only browsing of official Hyprland setting metadata with guarded safe-batch config writes for eligible normal scalar settings.
